sql_array: CREATE TABLE example_strings (id UInt32, string1 String, string2 String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO example_strings (id, string1, string2) VALUES (1, 'hello world', 'world hello');
UPDATE example_strings SET string2 = 'hello ClickHouse' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, stringJaccardIndexUTF8(string1, string2) AS jaccard_index FROM example_strings;
SELECT id, stringJaccardIndexUTF8(string1, 'hello') AS jaccard_index_hello FROM example_strings;
